🚀 App Hosting & PaaS

Deploy apps without managing servers — open source alternatives to Heroku, Vercel and Netlify.

Popular SaaS in this category

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to Heroku

App hosting platform as a service by Salesforce.

3 alternatives

Alternatives to Vercel

Frontend cloud with edge deploys for Next.js and more.

3 alternatives

Alternatives to Netlify

Jamstack hosting with Git-based deploys, functions and forms.

3 alternatives

Alternatives to Render

Heroku-style PaaS for web services, workers and databases.

3 alternatives

Alternatives to Railway

Developer-friendly platform to deploy any stack from Git.

3 alternatives
Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Dokku

Self-hosted mini-Heroku on a single server.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Coolify

Open source Vercel/Heroku/Netlify alternative with a UI.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

CapRover

Free, self-hosted PaaS with a clean UI.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆
